creator: kevindd992002@yahoo.com
text:
If I apply the workaround listed here: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248474#c17 , will it break all of policy-based routing? Or just the ones that use the IPsec interface as the gateway regardless which interface the PBR rule is applied to?

Also, would it makes to remove the misleading information in this pfsense document: https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/vpn/ipsec/routed-vti.html that says "NAT to the interface address works" because it does not as confirmed by a couple of people including me.
